use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and applications
Destructive actions like delete or remove operations
Secondary or alternative action options in UI flows
ai_summary: A versatile Button component built with class-variance-authority (CVA) for flexible variant management and Radix UI Slot for composition patterns. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features standard accessibility patterns including focus-visible outlines and disabled states with proper pointer-events handling. Designed as a reusable atomic component suitable for any SaaS, fintech, or e-commerce application requiring consistent button styling across desktop and mobile platforms.
